narrative:
Jackson (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,308 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.9 percentage points.
